results.question: Which month in 2023 had the highest total gross profit?
results.gold_sql: SELECT d.month_name, SUM(f.transaction_gross_profit) AS total_gross_profit FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key WHERE d.year = 2023 GROUP BY d.month_num, d.month_name ORDER BY total_gross_profit DESC LIMIT 1;
results.generated_sql:
SELECT d.year, d.month_num, d.month_name, SUM(f.transaction_gross_profit) AS total_gross_profit
FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f
JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key
WHERE d.year = 2023
GROUP BY d.year, d.month_num, d.month_name
ORDER BY total_gross_profit DESC
LIMIT 1

results.question: What is the total gross profit by store state in 2024?
results.gold_sql: SELECT s.store_branch_state, SUM(f.transaction_gross_profit) AS total_gross_profit FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dim_dates d ON f.event_date_key = d.date_key JOIN bl_dm.dm_store_branches s ON f.store_branch_surr_id = s.store_branch_surr_id WHERE d.year = 2024 GROUP BY s.store_branch_state ORDER BY total_gross_profit DESC;
results.generated_sql: SELECT s.store_branch_state, SUM(f.transaction_gross_profit) AS total_profit FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_store_branches s ON f.store_branch_surr_id = s.store_branch_surr_id WHERE f.event_date_key BETWEEN 20240101 AND 20241231 GROUP BY s.store_branch_state ORDER BY total_profit DESC NULLS LAST

results.question: Which product has the highest average profit margin?
results.gold_sql: SELECT p.product_name, AVG(f.transaction_profit_margin) AS avg_profit_margin FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f JOIN bl_dm.dm_products p ON f.product_surr_id = p.product_surr_id GROUP BY p.product_surr_id, p.product_name ORDER BY avg_profit_margin DESC LIMIT 1;
results.generated_sql:
SELECT p.product_category, AVG(f.transaction_profit_margin) AS avg_profit_ratio
FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd f
JOIN bl_dm.dm_products          p  ON f.product_surr_id  = p.product_surr_id
GROUP BY p.product_category
ORDER BY avg_profit_ratio DESC
LIMIT 1

results.question: What is the total revenue from transactions where the discount was greater than 20%?
results.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(transaction_sale_amount) AS total_revenue FROM bl_dm.fct_transactions_dd WHERE transaction_discount_pct > 20;
